data.name: StringLength
data.value: The field {0} must be a string with a maximum length of {1}.

data.name: IsPartOfASet
data.value: Is it part of a set?

data.name: IsGeneralState
data.value: Is it a general state, so not collection area specific?

data.name: Error_CollectionArea_NameEmpty
data.value: Collcetion area name cannot be empty.

data.name: Error_Error_Ocurred
data.value: A technical error has occurred and has been recorded. We will fix it as soon as possible.

data.name: Success_CollectionItemPicture_Created
data.value: Collection item picture was created successfully.

data.name: Error_CollectionItemPicture_NotFound
data.value: Collection item picture was not found.

data.name: Success_CollectionItemPicture_Deleted
data.value: Collection item picture was deleted successfully.

data.name: Error_ParentPlace_ParentOfItsOwn
data.value: A place cannot be a parent to itself.

data.name: CollectionItemEntity_AttributesConcepts
data.value: Collection item additional attributes and general concepts

data.name: Delete_Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete it?

data.name: Info_Delete_NotAllowed
data.value: Entries can only be deleted after consultation with the administrator or if there are no references to other entries. This is because deletion can have a negative impact on many collectibles.

data.name: CollectionItemEntity_Download_All
data.value: Download all collection items as YAML

data.name: Message_NothingFound
data.value:
Unfortunately, nothing was found.

Please try another term.

data.name: AccountDelete_Confirm
data.value: Delete data and close my account.

data.name: AccountDelete_Notification
data.value: Deleting this data will remove your account and your collection. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Download_Notification
data.value: Before deleting your account, please download your entries first.

data.name: CollectionItem_DownloadAll
data.value: Download all datas to the collection items

data.name: PersonalData_Notification
data.value: Your account contains personal data that you have provided to us. Here you can download or delete this data.

data.name: Message_GeneralText_String
data.value:
This is an automatically generated email. If you have any questions, please contact {0}.
Best regards

data.name: Message_GeneralText_Html
data.value: This is an automatically generated email. If you have any questions, please contact {0}. Best regards

data.name: NothingFound
data.value: No entries found for the search term.

data.name: IsGeneralConcept
data.value: IS it a general concept, so not collection area specific

data.name: SpecificView
data.value: Show concept with all its subconcepts

data.name: IsPublic
data.value: Is it intended for the general public?

data.name: Error_OwnershipProofPicture_NotFound
data.value: Picture of proof of ownership was not found.

data.name: Success_OwnershipProofPicture_Deleted
data.value: Picture of proof of ownership was deleted successfully.

data.name: Success_OwnershipProofPicture_Created
data.value: Picture of proof of ownership was created successfully.

data.name: Success_OwnershipProofPicture_Updated
data.value: Picture of proof of ownership was updated successfully.

data.name: CookieConsent_Text
data.value: We only use cookies to enable users to access the site.

data.name: Error_Session_Expired
data.value: Session expired. Please restart your registration.

data.name: Passkey_Information
data.value:
What is a passkey?

A passkey is a secure and convenient alternative to passwords.

  • No need to remember a password
  • No E-Mail necessary
  • Phishing-proof
  • Passkeys already stored on this device are automatically recognized
  • Synchronized between your devices
  • Supported by: iPhone (Touch ID/Face ID), Android, Windows Hello

data.name: Meta_Description
data.value: Interesting and unique collectibles: Manage your own and find those from other collectors

data.name: Info_PlaceName_NotChangeable
data.value: Place name is only deletable and addable

data.name: Error_Organization_ConnectedToCollectionItems
data.value: Organization is still connected to a collection item.

data.name: Error_SortingOrder_Range
data.value: The sorting order must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_StatePreservationName_IsMissing
data.value: Name of state preservation is missing.

data.name: Error_StatePreservationId_IsMissing
data.value: Id of state preservation is missing.

data.name: Error_CollectionAreaId_Range
data.value: The collection area Id must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_StatePreservationID_Range
data.value: The state of preservation Id must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_ConceptId_Range
data.value: The concept Id must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_ConceptValueId_Range
data.value: Id of the concept value must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_EraId_Range
data.value: Id of era must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_OwnershipProofPictureId_Range
data.value: The ownership picture ID must be greater than 0.

data.name: Error_OwnershipProofPicture_IsMissing
data.value: Picture of proof of ownership is missing.

data.name: Error_CollectionItemId_Required
data.value: Id of Collection item is missing.

data.name: Error_CollectionItemId_Range
data.value: Id of collection item must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_PlaceId_Range
data.value: Id of collection item must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_OrganizationId_Range
data.value: Id of organizaton must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_IndividualId_Range
data.value: Id of individual must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Info_CollectionItemRelationship
data.value: This is about relationships between the collection item and the dimensions

data.name: CollectionAreaSearchParamters_Select
data.value: Select for collection area search parameters

data.name: CollectionItemSearchParameters_Select
data.value: Select for collection item search paramters

data.name: CollectionRelationshipSearchParameters_Select
data.value: Select for collection relationship search parameters

data.name: Error_TopicId_Range
data.value: Topic Id must be bigger than 0.

data.name: Error_DisplayName_StringLength
data.value: Display name must be 2-100 characters long.
